block_00: Three most common ways traders lose money
block_01: Sometimes traders lose money. It is a regretful fact that comes hand in hand with any risky business. However, most of the losses happen due to common mistakes made by traders themselves. We can help you to find those problems, so you can avoid them in the future.
block_02: There are three most common mistakes that traders make:
block_04: Trading is a serious business and, like any other business, it requires a trader to have knowledge about market trends and a strategy to deal with them.
block_07: To minimize risks, some traders make small deposits. However, it is a double-edged sword, as small deposits leave no room for a rebound if there is a loss.
block_10: It is hard to watch your money at risk but in order to be quick and decisive, a trader should be cool and collected. Being emotional, in turn, will lead to hasty acts and losses.
block_12: Keeping that in mind, you will be able to solve those problems and get bigger earnings.
